description: Recto: letter (to judge by the words من مولاي), three lines and the top half of a fourth from the right side. Cut and reused for the tiny letter on verso, starting with a cipher at the top and the basmala, then the usual opening formula كتبت لسيدي مولاي اطال الله بقاك and ending with the pre-closing formula ان شا الله.
